content_body:
Blairsville Cinema owners Linda, Donald, and Jason Lingerfelt are excited to announce that the Blairsville Cinema is completely remodeled. It has all new seating and a fresh new look.

Linda says, “We want it to be a safe environment where families can go see a movie without leaving Union County. It will be something fun to do close to home.”

Blairsville Cinema offers a complete concession stand with delicious popcorn, candy, soft drinks, and more. Located at 38 Backyard Lane, Blairsville, Georgia the theater is right beside Union County Galaxy Bowling Center. For movie times and schedules call us or see local listings in the North Georgia News.
title: Blairsville Cinema
